news.t: Touchstone Investments Unveils International Equity ETF to Capture Growth Opportunities in International Markets

holdings.infoBox: TLCI is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 5.77%, Safran at 4.77%, InterContinental Hotels Group at 4.59%, Compass Group at 4.53%, and ASML Holding at 4.36%.

overview.description: The Touchstone International Equity ETF (TLCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in equity securities of large-cap firms outside the US. The fund aims for long-term growth of capital. TLCI was launched on Mar 3, 2025 and is issued by Touchstone.

data.title: Touchstone Investments Unveils International Equity ETF to Capture Growth Opportunities in International Markets
data.text: CINCINNATI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Touchstone Investments announces new ETF with The London Company as the sub-advisor.
